name: William Olman | 1890
description:
Farmer char | wife diagnosed with Hysteria user

A bit of a mouthful

Please do not look at me like I'm supposed to be an expert on anything. There could be 1000 things wrong with this plot line. Don't come for me. It's just me wanting to write something that's been on my brain.

That being said

Feel free to educate and talk about this stuff in the comments! I love learning!

I'm in Fluff Central. I'm sorry I can't help it.
creator: _Keeda_
